overall.description: Bus simulator gameplay showing first-person driving perspective from the driver's cabin during a heavy rainstorm. The bus navigates through urban streets with active windshield wipers, making a right turn at an intersection and continuing past residential buildings and parked cars while following a GPS route displayed on the dashboard screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban avenue with multiple traffic lanes

agents.ego_description: driving straight along a wide tree-lined avenue with windshield wipers active, maintaining steady speed in the right lane

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with headlights on approaching in the opposite lane

entered.detail: dense row of green trees lining both sides of the wide avenue creating a canopy effect
interior dashboard with speedometer, controls, and illuminated displays visible through rain-streaked windshield
navigation display showing route map with blue arrow indicator and turn instructions

segments.scene_description: The bus travels steadily along a wide, tree-lined urban avenue during heavy rainfall. Windshield wipers sweep continuously across the glass as the vehicle approaches an intersection in the distance. The dashboard GPS displays the route ahead while sparse oncoming traffic with headlights illuminated moves in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street intersection with parked vehicles

events.description: bus begins right turn maneuver at intersection, steering into narrower residential street

agents.ego_description: executing a right turn at the intersection, navigating from the wide avenue into a narrower street lined with parked cars

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with balconies and weathered facade lining the new street
continuous line of parked vehicles along the right curb including sedans and compact cars

segments.scene_description: The bus executes a right turn at the intersection, leaving the tree-lined avenue behind and entering a narrower residential street. The view shifts to show apartment buildings on the right with a continuous row of parked cars along the curb. The windshield wipers maintain their steady rhythm as the vehicle completes the turn and straightens out.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed residential and commercial street with continuous parking

agents.ego_description: proceeding straight along the residential street, passing rows of parked cars and alternating apartment buildings

entered.detail: distinctive red-painted multi-story residential building standing out among neutral-colored structures
ground-floor shops with residential units above featuring various storefronts and signage

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the wet urban street, the bus passes a distinctive red apartment building and mixed commercial structures with ground-floor shops. Parked cars line the right side of the road, moving from the near foreground to mid-ground as the bus advances. The rain maintains its steady intensity with water droplets streaming down the side windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection approaching modern commercial district

events.description: approaching large intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic signals visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving toward a major intersection with a prominent modern glass building visible in the distance, maintaining reduced speed

notable_agents.action: person walking on sidewalk near the intersection wearing bright clothing visible through rain

entered.detail: tall contemporary building with reflective glass facade dominating the skyline at the end of the street
metal railway tracks embedded in the road surface indicating a tram or light rail line
large road junction with traffic lights, crosswalk markings, and multiple approach lanes

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches a major urban intersection with a striking modern glass office tower rising in the distance. Tram tracks become visible embedded in the road surface as the vehicle nears the crosswalk markings. The residential buildings give way to a more commercial district, with the rain continuing to reduce visibility through the windshield.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it moves from a wide, tree-lined avenue into a dense commercial urban district during a heavy rainstorm. It begins with the vehicle traveling steadily toward an intersection, the windshield wipers sweeping rhythmically against the rain while a GPS route glows on the dashboard. As the bus executes a right turn, the open avenue shifts into a narrower residential street lined with apartment buildings and a continuous row of parked cars. The scene then progresses past a distinctive red apartment building and ground-floor shops, with water streaming down the side windows as the vehicle advances. Finally, the residential surroundings give way to a commercial center, where tram tracks appear in the road and a modern glass office tower rises in the distance through the rain-blurred visibility.
